languages.text: "Наши клятвы, Ваша Светлость. Когда вы вернетесь из логова Погонщицы с победой, Иждриг бросит вам вызов... Я хотела предупредить вас. Полковник Батошски будет биться изо всех сил. Вам следует подготовиться. Я видела как однажды он облил себя прометием и поджег, а затем бросился в рукопашную на три отростка разом. Он страшный противник".

"Our oath of loyalty, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. When you return victorious from the Drover's lair, Izdrig is going to challenge you... I wanted to warn you. Colonel Batoshski will fight bitterly, and you should prepare well. I once saw him drench himself in promethium and set himself on fire before fighting three of the Drover's shoots unarmed. He's a fearsome enemy."
languages.original_text: "Наши клятвы, Ваша Светлость. Когда вы вернетесь из логова Погонщицы с победой, Иждриг бросит вам вызов... Я хотела предупредить вас. Полковник Батошски будет биться изо всех сил. Вам следует подготовиться. Я видела как однажды он облил себя прометием и поджег, а затем бросился в рукопашную на три отростка разом. Он страшный противник".

traits.locale_text: "Our oath of loyalty, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. When you return victorious from the Drover's lair, Izdrig is going to challenge you... I wish to warn you. Colonel Batoshski will fight bitterly, and you should prepare well. I once saw him drench himself in promethium and set himself on fire before fighting three of the Drover's shoots in hand-to-hand combat. He's a fearsome enemy."

"Our oath of loyalty, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. When you return victorious from the Drover's lair, Izdrig is going to challenge you... I wanted to warn you. Colonel Batoshski will fight bitterly, and you should prepare well. I once saw him drench himself in promethium and set himself on fire before fighting three of the Drover's shoots unarmed. He's a fearsome enemy."

"He would prefer to remain isolated from the Imperium. He sees it as his duty to preserve the regiment and its banner. To protect the lives of the few soldiers of past Call-Ups. And he believes that we'll all either be shot for five centuries of supposed desertion, or returned to the status of penal soldiers. He has faith in the God-Emperor, but not in the powers that be, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

"Our oath of loyalty, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. When you return victorious from the Drover's lair, Izdrig is going to challenge you... I wish to warn you. Colonel Batoshski will fight bitterly, and you should prepare well. I once saw him drench himself in promethium and set himself on fire before fighting three of the Drover's shoots in hand-to-hand combat. He's a fearsome enemy."

"Our oath of loyalty, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. When you return victorious from the Drover's lair, Izdrig is going to challenge you... I wanted to warn you. Colonel Batoshski will fight bitterly, and you should prepare well. I once saw him drench himself in promethium and set himself on fire before fighting three of the Drover's shoots unarmed. He's a fearsome enemy."

"Our oath of loyalty, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. When you return victorious from the Drover's lair, Izdrig is going to challenge you... I wanted to warn you. Colonel Batoshski will fight bitterly, and you should prepare well. I once saw him drench himself in promethium and set himself on fire before fighting three of the Drover's shoots unarmed. He's a fearsome enemy."

languages.text: 「彼は帝国から距離を置いたままでいたいと思っている。彼の務めは連隊とその軍旗を守り抜くこと、過去の召集で生き残ったわずかな兵の命を守ることだ。そして彼は、我々は五世紀に及ぶ“脱走”の嫌疑で皆銃殺されるか、あるいは懲罰兵の身分に戻されるだろうと考えている。彼は神帝を信じてはいるが、為政者どもは信じていないのだ、{mf|閣下|閣下}」
languages.original_text: "He would prefer to remain isolated from the Imperium. He sees it as his duty to preserve the regiment and its banner. To protect the lives of the few soldiers of past Call-Ups. And he believes that we'll all either be shot for five centuries of supposed desertion, or returned to the status of penal soldiers. He has faith in the God-Emperor, but not in the powers that be, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: 「彼は帝国から距離を置いたままでいたいと思っている。彼の務めは連隊とその軍旗を守り抜くこと、過去の召集で生き残ったわずかな兵の命を守ることだ。そして彼は、我々は五世紀に及ぶ“脱走”の嫌疑で皆銃殺されるか、あるいは懲罰兵の身分に戻されるだろうと考えている。彼は神帝を信じてはいるが、為政者どもは信じていないのだ、{mf|閣下|閣下}。」

languages.text: « Notre serment de loyauté, Votre Seigneurie. Quand vous reviendrez {mf|victorieux|victorieuse} de l'antre du Chasseur, Izdrig va vouloir vous défier... Je préférais vous prévenir. Le colonel Batoshski combattra bec et ongles, vous devrez bien vous préparer. Je l'ai déjà vu se couvrir de prométhium et s'enflammer avant d'affronter trois des pousses du Chasseur à mains nues. C'est un adversaire redoutable. »
languages.original_text: "Our oath of loyalty, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. When you return victorious from the Drover's lair, Izdrig is going to challenge you... I wanted to warn you. Colonel Batoshski will fight bitterly, and you should prepare well. I once saw him drench himself in promethium and set himself on fire before fighting three of the Drover's shoots unarmed. He's a fearsome enemy."

traits.locale_text: « Notre serment de loyauté, Votre Seigneurie. Quand vous reviendrez {mf|victorieux|victorieuse} de l'antre du Chasseur, Izdrig va vouloir vous défier... Je préférais vous prévenir. Le colonel Batoshski combattra bec et ongles, vous devrez bien vous préparer. Je l'ai déjà vu se couvrir de prométhium et s'enflammer avant d'affronter trois des pousses du Chasseur à mains nues. C'est un adversaire redoutable. »

languages.text: "Sadakat yeminimiz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Çoban'ın ininden zaferle döndüğünüzde İzdrig size meydan okuyacak... Sizi uyarmak istedim. Albay Batoshski, kıyasıya savaşacak. İyi hazırlanmalısınız. Bir keresinde kendini prometyuma bulayıp ateşe verdiğini ve Çoban'ın filizlerinden üçüyle silahsız çatışmaya girdiğini görmüştüm. Kendisi korkutucu bir düşman olacaktır."
languages.original_text: "Our oath of loyalty, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. When you return victorious from the Drover's lair, Izdrig is going to challenge you... I wanted to warn you. Colonel Batoshski will fight bitterly, and you should prepare well. I once saw him drench himself in promethium and set himself on fire before fighting three of the Drover's shoots unarmed. He's a fearsome enemy."

traits.locale_text: "Sadakat yeminimiz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Çoban'ın ininden zaferle döndüğünüzde İzdrig size meydan okuyacak... Sizi uyarmak istedim. Albay Batoshski, kıyasıya savaşacak. İyi hazırlanmalısınız. Bir keresinde kendini prometyuma bulayıp ateşe verdiğini ve Çoban'ın filizlerinden üçüyle silahsız çatışmaya girdiğini görmüştüm. Kendisi korkutucu bir düşman olacaktır."

languages.text: "Unser Treueeid, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Wenn Ihr siegreich aus dem Hort des Treibers zurückkehrt, wird Izdrig Euch herausfordern ... Ich wollte Euch warnen. Colonel Batoshski wird erbittert kämpfen. Ihr solltet Euch gut vorbereiten. Einmal hat er sich mit Promethium übergossen und angezündet, bevor er unbewaffnet gegen drei Triebe des Treibers kämpfte. Er ist ein Furcht erregender Feind."
languages.original_text: "Our oath of loyalty, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. When you return victorious from the Drover's lair, Izdrig is going to challenge you... I wanted to warn you. Colonel Batoshski will fight bitterly, and you should prepare well. I once saw him drench himself in promethium and set himself on fire before fighting three of the Drover's shoots unarmed. He's a fearsome enemy."

traits.locale_text: "Unser Treueeid, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Wenn Ihr siegreich aus dem Hort des Treibers zurückkehrt, wird Izdrig Euch herausfordern ... Ich wollte Euch warnen. Colonel Batoshski wird erbittert kämpfen. Ihr solltet Euch gut vorbereiten. Einmal hat er sich mit Promethium übergossen und angezündet, bevor er unbewaffnet gegen drei Triebe des Treibers kämpfte. Er ist ein Furcht erregender Feind."

languages.text: «Nuestro juramento de lealtad, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Cuando vuelva tras su victoria en la guarida del Pastor, Izdrig tiene intención de desafiarle... Quería advertirle. El coronel Batoshski luchará amargamente y debería prepararse. En una ocasión lo vi cubrirse de prometio y prenderse fuego antes de luchar desarmado contra tres brotes del Pastor. Es un oponente formidable».
languages.original_text: "Our oath of loyalty, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. When you return victorious from the Drover's lair, Izdrig is going to challenge you... I wanted to warn you. Colonel Batoshski will fight bitterly, and you should prepare well. I once saw him drench himself in promethium and set himself on fire before fighting three of the Drover's shoots unarmed. He's a fearsome enemy."

traits.locale_text: «Nuestro juramento de lealtad, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Cuando vuelva tras su victoria en la guarida del Pastor, Izdrig tiene intención de desafiarle... Quería advertirle. El coronel Batoshski luchará amargamente y debería prepararse. En una ocasión lo vi cubrirse de prometio y prenderse fuego antes de luchar desarmado contra tres brotes del Pastor. Es un oponente formidable».

languages.text: “是关于我们的忠诚誓言，舰长大人。等您从拒生花的巢穴得胜归来，伊兹德里格就会向您发起挑战……我想提前给您提个醒。巴托什斯基上校会拼死一战，您得做好准备。我亲眼见过他往自己身上浇满钷素，并在点燃后赤手空拳地对付拒生花的三条芽条。他是个极其可怕的对手。”
languages.original_text: "Our oath of loyalty, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. When you return victorious from the Drover's lair, Izdrig is going to challenge you... I wanted to warn you. Colonel Batoshski will fight bitterly, and you should prepare well. I once saw him drench himself in promethium and set himself on fire before fighting three of the Drover's shoots unarmed. He's a fearsome enemy."

traits.locale_text: “是关于我们的忠诚誓言，舰长大人。等您从拒生花的巢穴得胜归来，伊兹德里格就会向您发起挑战……我想提前给您提个醒。巴托什斯基上校会拼死一战，您得做好准备。我亲眼见过他往自己身上浇满钷素，并在点燃后赤手空拳地对付拒生花的三条芽条。他是个极其可怕的对手。”
